'''shathaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pylorospasm|pylorospasm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pylorospasm|pylorospasm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shathaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæthæyæth|shæthæyæth]] || [[word:shæthæyæj|shæthæyæj]] || [[word:shæthæyæsh|shæthæyæsh]] || [[word:shæthæyæ|shæthæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathathayath|shathathayath]] || [[word:shathathayaj|shathathayaj]] || [[word:shathathayash|shathathayash]] || [[word:shathathaya|shathathaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathayath|shathayath]] || [[word:shathayaj|shathayaj]] || [[word:shathayash|shathayash]] || [[word:shathaya|shathaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathafyath|shathafyath]] || [[word:shathafyaj|shathafyaj]] || [[word:shathafyash|shathafyash]] || [[word:shathafyaf|shathafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shathayatha|shathayatha]] || [[word:shathayaja|shathayaja]] || [[word:shathayasha|shathayasha]] || [[word:shathayaka|shathayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shathayath|shathayath]] || [[word:shathayaj|shathayaj]] || [[word:shathayash|shathayash]] || [[word:shathaya|shathaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shathayathal|shathayathal]] || [[word:shathayajal|shathayajal]] || [[word:shathayashal|shathayashal]] || [[word:shathayakal|shathayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shathayathatha|shathayathatha]] || [[word:shathayajaja|shathayajaja]] || [[word:shathayashasha|shathayashasha]] || [[word:shathayaka|shathayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shathayathan|shathayathan]] || [[word:shathayajan|shathayajan]] || [[word:shathayashan|shathayashan]] || [[word:shathayakan|shathayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shathayathaoro|shathayathaoro]] || [[word:shathayajaoro|shathayajaoro]] || [[word:shathayashaoro|shathayashaoro]] || [[word:shathayakaoro|shathayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
